fees.conditions: Carry-on varies by cabin: Economy/Premium Economy get 1 piece up to 7 kg; Business/First get 2 pieces up to 7 kg each. Size limits apply.
Checked baggage included under the piece or weight concept depending on route; allowance varies by cabin and fare family

fees.amount: Depends on route and baggage concept
fees.conditions: Excess baggage charges apply when exceeding the free allowance; fees vary by route, cabin, and number of pieces or weight

fees.amount: Depends on route and excess weight
fees.conditions: Checked bags exceeding standard weight limits incur overweight charges; maximum accepted weight per bag is 32 kg

fees.amount: Depends on route, size, and aircraft handling
fees.conditions: Checked bags exceeding standard size limits are subject to oversize charges; acceptance subject to aircraft and airport handling limits
Standard seat selection included for most fares; timing and availability depend on fare family and cabin

fees.amount: Depends on route and fare family
fees.conditions: Preferred or extra-legroom seats may incur a fee on some Economy fares depending on route and fare family

fees.amount: Depends on fare family and route
fees.conditions: Change and cancellation fees depend on fare family and route; some fares are non-refundable; fare differences may apply
Unaccompanied Minor service available for eligible ages; fees and conditions vary by route and fare
